posts.text:
BREAKING: The IRGC says that the Strait of Hormuz is closed and any transit through the waterway will face “harsh measures.”

Three container ships of various nationalities were just turned back from the Strait of Hormuz after warnings from the IRGC navy, media reports.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
